title: NFT Transfer Monitor
description: Real-time feed of NFT mints, sales, and transfers for any collection — subscribe to ERC-721 Transfer events via the wallet activity stream.
useCase: Build a live collection activity feed that shows every mint, transfer, and sale for an NFT collection as it happens — like OpenSea's activity tab but in real-time via WebSocket.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain where the NFT collection is deployed
keyParams.collectionContract: NFT collection contract address to monitor for Transfer events
